title: LiveProfiler
body:
LiveProfiler is a real-time in-game performance profiler for tracking how long specific processes take to complete.
It provides low-overhead timing hooks that help identify performance bottlenecks in mods or internal systems.

This utility is primarily designed for mod developers to analyze the performance of their own code. However, it can also be used to inspect other mods that integrate with LiveProfiler, offering deeper insight into what may be impacting performance.
